rules: Headings must use Oswald, uppercase, with tight tracking (tracking-tighter) for large sizes.
Overlines and small labels must use uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em], text-muted.
Body text uses IBM Plex Sans for a technical, precise look.
Use tabular-nums for clocks, times, and statistics.

layout.grid: Control Room Grid (Dense, gap-4 to gap-6). Base Grid: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12.
layout.surfaces: Technical Grid Borders: 1px solid borders (border-[#27272A]) on flat dark backgrounds (#141414). No soft shadows. Use sharp radii (rounded-none or max rounded-md).
layout.spacing: Generous inner padding for cards (p-6). Tight spacing for data rows.

motion.interactions: Precise, military feel. Micro-interactions only. framer-motion for smooth entrance.
motion.checklist: Checkbox click should have a snappy scale effect. Strikethrough text with an opacity fade on completion.
motion.completion_reward: Trigger 'canvas-confetti' (in a neon/metallic color palette like gold, lime, white) when all daily tasks are completed.

components.header_command_center: Sticky top bar or hero section showing real-time digital clock, current date, and a large progress ring/bar for daily completion %. Include current streak count.
components.timeline_checklist: A vertical list of tasks with their corresponding times. The system must calculate the current time block and apply an 'active' style (border-l-4 border-[#CCFF00] bg-[#CCFF00]/10) to the current task.
components.invariant_rules: A dedicated solid panel listing the inviolable rules (Sommeil, Alimentation, Sport, Cheveux, Posture).
components.workout_panel: A specific widget for 'SÉANCE MAISON (15 MIN - V-SHAPE)' showing the timer details.

image_urls.description: Athletic silhouette. Use as a subtle background image with low opacity (10-20%) and blend-mode overlay inside the 'Séance Maison' card or the overall Header background.
Matte black abstract geometric background. Use as a full app background with bg-cover, opacity-50, and fixed positioning.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React application with Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI primitives.
Include dependencies: framer-motion, canvas-confetti, @types/canvas-confetti, date-fns, lucide-react.
Google Fonts: Import 'Oswald' and 'IBM Plex Sans' in index.html or global CSS.
Data Layer: Implement a custom hook 'useProtocolStore' utilizing localStorage. It must track the checklist state, daily progress, last reset date, streak, and weekly history.
Logic - Midnight Reset: Check current date vs last reset date on app load. If different, reset checklist checkboxes and update streak (increment if 100% completed previous day, reset to 0 if not).
Logic - Real-time Highlighter: Use a useEffect running every minute to determine which checklist item should be active based on its scheduled time vs current system time.
Checklist Data: 09:30 Réveil & Douche, 09:40 Crème, 09:45 10 reps sourire, 10:00 Petit-déj, 14:00 Bronzage, 18:00 Système Physique, 00:30 Extinction lumière.
Testing: Add data-testid to every checkbox, button, and dynamic text element.
